allow: Bash(node -e "const http=require\('http'\),fs=require\('fs'\),path=require\('path'\);http.createServer\(\(req,res\)=>{const f=path.join\('.',req.url==='/'?'/ndis_directory.html':req.url\);fs.readFile\(f,\(e,d\)=>{if\(e\){res.writeHead\(404\);res.end\('Not found'\)}else{const ext=path.extname\(f\);const ct={'html':'text/html','css':'text/css','js':'text/javascript','png':'image/png','jpg':'image/jpeg'}[ext.slice\(1\)]||'text/plain';res.writeHead\(200,{'Content-Type':ct}\);res.end\(d\)}}\)}\).listen\(8080,\(\)=>console.log\('Server running at http://localhost:8080'\)\)")
